This docs+ADR story is the ONLY in-scope deliverable for the current increment; stop after it is review-ready.

evidence: Lane B: src/reverso/protocols/adapters/claude.py implements ProviderAdapter. Falsifiable OAuth gate (tests/unit/test_claude_oauth_gate.py, 11 tests): reads claudeAiOauth directly (Keychain 'Claude Code-credentials' or ~/.claude/.credentials.json); AuthResolution.method=='claude_oauth' always; no api-key path; ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/CLAUDE_CODE_OAUTH_TOKEN never consumed. Falsifiability proven by injecting auth-by-elimination anti-pattern (test failed) then restoring.

claudeGoal.objective: Claude adapter behind the provider interface with the falsifiable subscription-OAuth gate test (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + OAuth credential -> OAuth path resolved, fails if it falls through to API-key).
